was the order of the day running along the coast before a big test at the end a nasty Spike to finish today's proceedings with ramps of 16 and more well not a big distance either 120 kilometers but we every single test was Jonah's finger go his determination was to honor Nathan van Hoy donk who suffered an accident in the morning as news filtered through that his condition was a lot better than the brilliantly so Finn Fisher black closest to him other good finishers including Walt polls who'd had a fabulous final ramp but it was all about whether the lead of the race would change himself was trying to find time maybe maybe the inter team rivalry within yombo visma just starting to show roglitch coming across the line giving a quick check over his shoulder to see where sep Kush was and the answer was a further four seconds behind so the gap between vingego roguelich and sepkus narrowing on the day exchanging places in the overall classification another stage win for vingego he gave sepkus a cuddle no apologies none asked for either finger winning ahead of him Fisher black what polls Storer ayuzo Mass vlasov roguelich Lander and sepkus rounding out the top 10 finishing a minute and five down plus of course those bonus seconds factored in as well it means sepkus still leads this race but with some serious climbing days to come his margin of advantages only 29 seconds over event Google and one minute and 33 over roglitch ayuzo possibly thinking about a Podium and mouse likewise and so what of tomorrow well the word the angly rule always causes some nerves and no await on stage 17. foreign
